# Source Tree Analysis — 3d-portal

**Document type:** Annotated source tree (generated by `bmad-document-project`, 2026-05-15).
**Scan level:** quick (pattern-based, supplemented by direct inspection of module names; no exhaustive source-file reading).
**Purpose:** Give downstream BMAD workflows a map of WHERE code lives so they can target the right module without re-scanning.

---

## Top-level layout

```
3d-portal/
├── apps/
│   ├── api/               # FastAPI backend (Part: api)
│   │   ├── app/
│   │   │   ├── main.py            # create_app() factory — entry point
│   │   │   ├── router.py          # Mounts module routers under /api/*
│   │   │   ├── core/              # Cross-cutting: auth, db, logging, settings, csrf
│   │   │   │   ├── auth/
│   │   │   │   │   └── dependencies.py   # current_user, current_admin
│   │   │   │   ├── db/
│   │   │   │   │   ├── session.py        # SQLModel engine + get_session
│   │   │   │   │   ├── seed.py           # bootstrap data
│   │   │   │   │   └── models/           # SQLModel entities (split: _auth, _user, _entities, _audit, _enums, _helpers)
│   │   │   │   ├── config.py             # pydantic-settings get_settings()
│   │   │   │   └── logging/              # JsonFormatter, log contract impl
│   │   │   └── modules/                  # Bounded contexts (one router per module)
│   │   │       ├── admin/                # /api/admin/* — admin CRUD
│   │   │       ├── auth/                 # /api/auth/* — login, refresh
│   │   │       ├── runbook/              # /agent-runbook — Markdown for AI agents (Initiative 2)
│   │   │       ├── share/                # /api/share/* + /api/admin/share/* — public + admin
│   │   │       └── sot/                  # /api/sot/* + /api/admin/sot/* — source-of-truth ingest
│   │   ├── migrations/                   # Alembic
│   │   │   └── versions/                 # 11 migrations, 0001..0011
│   │   ├── tests/
│   │   ├── pyproject.toml                # Python 3.12, FastAPI ≥0.115, SQLModel 0.0.22
│   │   └── Dockerfile
│   │
│   └── web/               # React SPA (Part: web)
│       ├── src/
│       │   ├── main.tsx               # entry point
│       │   ├── instrument.ts          # Sentry/GlitchTip SDK init (Initiative 1)
│       │   ├── release.ts             # single RELEASE constant (build + runtime parity)
│       │   ├── lib/
│       │   │   ├── api.ts             # MANDATORY HTTP helper — CSRF, credentials, silent refresh
│       │   │   └── ...
│       │   ├── ui/                    # shadcn/ui components (installed via `npx shadcn add`)
│       │   ├── shell/
│       │   │   ├── AppShell.tsx       # Top-level chrome (only place — modules render inside)
│       │   │   ├── ModuleRail.tsx
│       │   │   ├── TopBar.tsx
│       │   │   ├── AuthContext.tsx    # useAuth() — single source of auth state
│       │   │   └── AuthGate.tsx
│       │   ├── modules/               # Bounded contexts
│       │   │   └── catalog/           # Live module: components, hooks, routes
│       │   ├── routes/                # TanStack Router file-style modules
│       │   │   ├── __root.tsx         # Wraps <AppShell><Outlet /></AppShell>
│       │   │   ├── index.tsx
│       │   │   ├── login.tsx
│       │   │   ├── catalog/           # Catalog routes (live)
│       │   │   ├── queue/             # v2 slot — placeholder route
│       │   │   ├── printer/           # v2 slot — placeholder
│       │   │   ├── spools/            # v2 slot — placeholder
│       │   │   ├── requests/          # v2 slot — placeholder
│       │   │   ├── settings/          # v2 slot
│       │   │   └── dev/               # internal dev page
│       │   ├── locales/
│       │   │   ├── en.json            # i18n — mandatory parity with pl.json
│       │   │   └── pl.json
│       │   └── styles/
│       │       └── theme.css          # Tailwind v4 @theme {}, --color-* tokens, --color-viewer-* (three.js)
│       ├── vite.config.ts             # @sentry/vite-plugin 5.2.x integration
│       ├── package.json               # React 19, TS 5.6, Vite 6
│       └── Dockerfile
│
├── workers/
│   └── render/            # arq render worker (Part: worker)
│       ├── render/                    # worker code (trimesh + matplotlib pipeline)
│       ├── tests/
│       ├── pyproject.toml             # editable dep on portal-api
│       └── Dockerfile
│
├── infra/                 # (Part: infra)
│   ├── docker-compose.yml             # prod stack on .190
│   ├── docker-compose.dev.yml         # dev stack (local)
│   ├── env.example
│   ├── nginx-180/
│   │   └── 3d-portal.conf             # edge nginx (proxied from configs repo)
│   └── scripts/
│       ├── deploy.sh                  # build → ship → migrate → verify
│       ├── verify-symbolication.sh    # post-deploy smoke (Initiative 1)
│       ├── glitchtip-triage.sh        # issue → markdown story stub (Initiative 1)
│       ├── upload-sourcemaps.sh       # legacy CLI fallback (issue #299 recovery)
│       ├── backup-sqlite.sh           # nightly cron on .190
│       ├── gen-htpasswd.sh            # household basic-auth provisioning
│       ├── render-all.sh              # bulk-enqueue renders for fresh content volume
│       ├── migrate_catalog_3mf.py     # one-shot 3mf migration helper
│       └── tests/                     # script-level tests
│
├── tests/                 # cross-cutting integration tests
│
├── docs/                  # this folder
│   ├── architecture.md                # condensed architecture (existing)
│   ├── operations.md                  # ops runbook (existing)
│   ├── project-overview.md            # NEW — generated by bmad-document-project
│   ├── source-tree-analysis.md        # NEW — this file
│   ├── index.md                       # NEW — master index
│   ├── design/2026-04-29-portal-design.md           # original v1 spec
│   ├── plans/2026-04-29-portal-v1-implementation.md # v1 implementation plan
│   ├── plans/2026-04-30-glitchtip-integration-*.md  # Initiative 1 (GlitchTip) source docs
│   ├── agents-add-model-runbook.md    # Initiative 2 runbook draft
│   ├── acceptance-results.md
│   └── migration-reports/
│
├── _bmad/                 # BMAD installer artifacts (skill catalog, config)
│   ├── _config/bmad-help.csv          # skill catalog
│   ├── bmm/config.yaml                # user_name, languages, output paths
│   ├── custom/                        # team + user customization overrides
│   └── scripts/resolve_customization.py
│
├── _bmad-output/          # BMAD planning + execution artifacts
│   ├── project-context.md             # 136 implementation rules — load-bearing for agents
│   ├── triage-backlog.md              # pre-existing-issue triage (Initiative-cross threshold)
│   ├── planning-artifacts/
│   │   ├── product-brief-3d-portal.md                      # Initiative 0 brief (created 2026-05-15) — the actual portal product
│   │   ├── product-brief-3d-portal-distillate.md
│   │   ├── product-brief-3d-portal-glitchtip.md            # Initiative 1 brief (renamed 2026-05-15 from product-brief-3d-portal.md)
│   │   ├── product-brief-3d-portal-glitchtip-distillate.md
│   │   ├── product-brief-3d-portal-ui-theme-hardening.md   # Initiative 3 brief
│   │   ├── product-brief-3d-portal-ui-theme-hardening-distillate.md
│   │   ├── prd.md                              # living initiatives ledger (Initiative 1-3)
│   │   ├── prd-validation-report.md
│   │   ├── architecture.md                     # initiative-scoped architecture
│   │   └── epics.md                            # E1-E5
│   └── implementation-artifacts/
│       ├── sprint-status.yaml                  # active sprint state (epic + story status)
│       ├── 1-1-* .. 4-3-*.md                   # story files (Epic 1-4)
│       ├── spec-tb-*.md                        # triage-backlog spec stubs
│       ├── epic-{1,2,4,5}-retro-*.md           # epic retrospectives
│       └── code-reviews/                       # per-story review docs
│
├── README.md
├── AGENTS.md              # vendor-neutral agent guide (Claude/Codex/Gemini share this)
├── CLAUDE.md              # Claude-specific addendum
└── package.json           # monorepo root (lockfile, workspace if any)
```

---

## Critical files for downstream BMAD planning

### Read these first when reasoning about the product

| File | Why |
|---|---|
| [`README.md`](../README.md) | 30-second pitch — what the portal is for. |
| [`docs/project-overview.md`](project-overview.md) | This sibling — full capability inventory + users + deployment. |
| [`docs/architecture.md`](architecture.md) | Component topology + future-proofing slots. |
| [`_bmad-output/project-context.md`](../_bmad-output/project-context.md) | 136 implementation rules — what agents must respect. |

### Read these when reasoning about delta initiatives (1-3)

| File | Why |
|---|---|
| [`_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/prd.md`](../_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/prd.md) | Initiative 1-3 living index. After Initiative 0 backfill: starts from the product foundation. |
| [`_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md`](../_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md) | E1-E5 decomposition. After backfill: also E0. |
| [`_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml`](../_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml) | What's in-flight right now. |

### Read these when reasoning about a specific concern

| Concern | Authoritative source |
|---|---|
| Auth flow (cookie + password + CSRF) | `apps/api/app/modules/auth/router.py`, `apps/api/app/core/auth/dependencies.py`, `apps/api/app/core/csrf.py` |
| Data model | `apps/api/app/core/db/models/` + `apps/api/migrations/versions/` (11 migrations) |
| Web HTTP wrapper | `apps/web/src/lib/api.ts` (CSRF + credentials + silent refresh contract) |
| Theme tokens (light/dark + viewer3D) | `apps/web/src/styles/theme.css` (`@theme {}` + `.dark { --color-viewer-* }`) |
| Render pipeline | `workers/render/render/*.py` + `apps/api/app/modules/admin/router.py` (POST render endpoint) |
| Edge proxy + share bypass | `infra/nginx-180/3d-portal.conf` |
| Observability contract | `~/repos/configs/docs/observability-logging-contract.md` (cross-repo, not in this tree) |

---

## Module ↔ route mapping (web)

| Frontend route | Backend route | Module state |
|---|---|---|
| `/` (index) | — | Landing/redirect |
| `/login` | `POST /api/auth/login`, `POST /api/auth/refresh` | Live |
| `/catalog`, `/catalog/$id` | `GET /api/sot/*`, `POST /api/admin/sot/*` | Live |
| `/queue` | `POST /api/admin/models/$id/render` (no GET yet) | Web placeholder only; backend module not scaffolded |
| `/printer` | — | Web placeholder; v2 Moonraker bridge slot |
| `/spools` | — | Web placeholder; v2 Spoolman bridge slot |
| `/requests` | — | Web placeholder; v2 member-print-request slot |
| `/settings` | — | Web placeholder |
| `/share/$token` (bypasses auth) | `GET /api/share/$token`, public asset paths | Live |
| `/agent-runbook` (served by API) | `GET /agent-runbook` | Live (Initiative 2) |

---

## Source-of-truth crosswalk (cross-repo)

- **Cross-repo catalog upstream:** `/mnt/c/Users/ezope/Nextcloud/3d_modelowanie/` (Windows-mounted via WSL). Has its own `AGENTS.md` describing folder schema.
- **Reverse-sync direction:** `.190` portal-content → WSL (via `scripts/hydrate_local_tree.py` + agent cookie-auth).
- **One-way Windows → .190 rsync is retired.** SoT ownership now lives in the portal DB, not the Windows folder.

---

## Excluded from this scan (deliberately)

- `node_modules/`, `apps/api/.venv/`, `__pycache__/`, `dist/`, `build/` — generated.
- `tmp/`, `*.png` screenshots at repo root — ephemeral palette comparisons + visual-regression artifacts.
- `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/*.md` story files — too granular for an overview; navigate via `sprint-status.yaml`.

---

## Verification recap

- Tests/extractions executed: directory-level `ls` on apps/api, apps/web, workers/render, infra; `find` for router files; migration count; module count. No source-file reading beyond what was already loaded for context. Quick scan as defined by `bmad-document-project` documentation-requirements.csv.
- Outstanding risks or follow-ups: this overview captures v1 + Initiatives 1-3 as of 2026-05-15. If new modules appear (queue backend, printer/Moonraker, spools/Spoolman), regenerate via `bmad-document-project` deep-dive on the relevant part.
- Recommended next checks before downstream PRD edits: confirm with Ezop that the four-part classification (web/api/worker/infra) matches his mental model — if he treats the BMAD `_bmad/` toolchain as a fifth part, that's a separate axis worth surfacing in the new product brief.
